case_title: JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. STELLA DAN et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: AUTHENTICITY OF LEASE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY
REQUEST FOR CLERK'S JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT DAN, STELLA

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DAN, STELLA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 133 SHIPLEY STREET, APT. E505, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94107, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT DAN, STELLA DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY SERVED MAY-23-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DAN, STELLA
